requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, high-ambient)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R600a可燃制冷剂处理（IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，高环境温度）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R600a可燃製冷劑處理（IEC 60335-2-24附件AA，高環境溫度）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia governs refrigerant safety for household refrigerating appliances primarily through the SASO-adopted electrical safety standard IEC 60335-2-24 and its Annex AA (requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants), assessed via the SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC). Household refrigerators marketed in Saudi Arabia have overwhelmingly transitioned to R600a (isobutane, GWP ≈ 3, ISO 817 safety class A3 — lower flammability). Manufacturers must: (1) verify that the refrigerant charge complies with IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability requirements (maximum R600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation, ignition-source control); (2) ensure the verification reflects high-ambient (T-class, up to 43 °C) operating conditions typical of the Gulf — flammable-refrigerant and pressure behaviour must be validated for the Saudi climate, not only temperate conditions; (3) ensure product documentation declares the refrigerant designation (R600a / isobutane) and charge quantity in grams; and (4) where any model contains an HFC (e.g., R134a, GWP 1430) or HFO, confirm the importer can still obtain a PCoC and assess any phase-down implications under Saudi Arabia's obligations as a party to the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol. Saudi grid operation is 230/400 V, 60 Hz, which affects compressor/inverter behaviour relevant to refrigerant-circuit testing.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯主要通过SASO采用的电气安全标准IEC 60335-2-24及其附件AA（使用可燃制冷剂器具的要求）管控家用制冷器具的制冷剂安全，并通过SABER产品符合性证书（PCoC）评定。沙特市场销售的家用电冰箱已大量转向使用R600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817安全分类A3——较低可燃性）。制造商须：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性要求（每种隔间配置的R600a最大充注量、通风、点火源控制）；（2）确保核实反映海湾典型的高环境温度（T类，最高43°C）运行条件——可燃制冷剂及压力行为须针对沙特气候而非仅温带条件验证；（3）确保产品文件声明制冷剂名称（R600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（4）若任何型号含氢氟烃（如R134a，GWP 1430）或氢氟烯烃，须确认进口商仍能取得PCoC，并评估沙特作为《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》缔约方的削减义务影响。沙特电网运行为230/400 V、60 Hz，影响与制冷剂回路测试相关的压缩机/变频器行为。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯主要通過SASO採用的電氣安全標準IEC 60335-2-24及其附件AA（使用可燃製冷劑器具的要求）管控家用製冷器具的製冷劑安全，並通過SABER產品符合性證書（PCoC）評定。沙特市場銷售的家用電冰箱已大量轉向使用R600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817安全分類A3——較低可燃性）。製造商須：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性要求（每種隔間配置的R600a最大充注量、通風、點火源控制）；（2）確保核實反映海灣典型的高環境溫度（T類，最高43°C）運行條件——可燃製冷劑及壓力行為須針對沙特氣候而非僅溫帶條件驗證；（3）確保產品文件聲明製冷劑名稱（R600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（4）若任何型號含氫氟碳化物（如R134a，GWP 1430）或氫氟烯烴，須確認進口商仍能取得PCoC，並評估沙特作為《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》締約方的削減義務影響。沙特電網運行為230/400 V、60 Hz，影響與製冷劑回路測試相關的壓縮機/變頻器行為。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex AA: Requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition source requirements) — adopted via SASO, assessed under SABER PCoC
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — Saudi Arabia HFC phase-down obligations (relevant for any HFC-containing models)

summary.en: China regulates refrigerant use primarily through GB 9237-2001 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps — general and related definitions; aligned with ISO 5149) and the more recent GB/T 5773-2016 (Performance test methods for positive displacement refrigerant compressors). For household appliances, IEC 60335-2-24-equivalent refrigerant charge limits are addressed in GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates R600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24). China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), with its own schedule administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese appliance manufacturers exporting to Saudi Arabia with R600a units are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect, but must verify charge amounts, documentation, and high-ambient behaviour against Saudi requirements.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 9237-2001（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求——一般要求和分类；参照ISO 5149）及较新的GB/T 5773-2016（容积式制冷剂压缩机性能试验方法）对制冷剂使用进行管理。家用器具方面，IEC 60335-2-24等效的制冷剂充注量限制已纳入GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R600a可燃性规定）。中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减计划，由生态环境部管理。使用R600a制冷剂的中国器具制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备较好的出口条件，但仍须核实充注量、文件及高环境温度下的行为是否符合沙特要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 9237-2001（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求——一般要求和分類；參照ISO 5149）及較新的GB/T 5773-2016（容積式製冷劑壓縮機性能試驗方法）對製冷劑使用進行管理。家用器具方面，IEC 60335-2-24等效的製冷劑充注量限制已納入GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R600a可燃性規定）。中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減計畫，由生態環境部管理。使用R600a製冷劑的中國器具製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備較好的出口條件，但仍須核實充注量、文件及高環境溫度下的行為是否符合沙特要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149:1993)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R600a appliances, the main gap is documentation, charge verification, and high-ambient validation rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) The PCoC technical file must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and the IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA flammability precautions; (2) The R600a charge must be verified against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA maximum limits AND validated for high-ambient (T-class, up to 43 °C) operation — Chinese CCC test reports performed under temperate-climate or 220/380 V 50 Hz configurations may not confirm Saudi 230/400 V 60 Hz high-ambient compliance without re-assessment; (3) If any model in the export range uses R134a or another HFC, the importer must confirm a PCoC can still be obtained and assess Saudi HFC phase-down implications under the Kigali Amendment. [NOTE: Saudi Arabia's specific HFC phase-down timeline and any product-level restrictions should be confirmed against current SASO/national regulation before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 对于R600a器具，主要差距在于文件、充注量核实及高环境温度验证，而非根本性技术差距：（1）PCoC技术文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性注意事项；（2）须核实R600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值，并针对高环境温度（T类，最高43°C）运行进行验证——中国CCC在温带气候或220/380 V 50 Hz配置下进行的检测报告，未经重新评估可能无法确认沙特230/400 V 60 Hz高环境温度合规；（3）若出口产品系列中有型号使用R134a或其他氢氟烃，进口商须确认仍可取得PCoC，并评估沙特依据《基加利修正案》的HFC削减影响。【注：应在监管提交前针对现行SASO/国家法规确认沙特具体HFC削减时间表及任何产品级限制。】
gap.zht: 對於R600a器具，主要差距在於文件、充注量核實及高環境溫度驗證，而非根本性技術差距：（1）PCoC技術文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及IEC 60335-2-24附件AA可燃性注意事項；（2）須核實R600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA最大限值，並針對高環境溫度（T類，最高43°C）運行進行驗證——中國CCC在溫帶氣候或220/380 V 50 Hz配置下進行的檢測報告，未經重新評估可能無法確認沙特230/400 V 60 Hz高環境溫度合規；（3）若出口產品系列中有型號使用R134a或其他氫氟碳化物，進口商須確認仍可取得PCoC，並評估沙特依據《基加利修正案》的HFC削減影響。【注：應在監管提交前針對現行SASO/國家法規確認沙特具體HFC削減時間表及任何產品級限制。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via SASO-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA (R600a charge limits), assessed under the SABER PCoC; Saudi HFC phase-down obligations apply under the Kigali Amendment for any HFC-containing models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate from the Saudi regime

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R600a is the dominant refrigerant in Saudi-market household refrigerators and is permitted. However, manufacturers must verify R600a charge against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA limits, validate flammable-refrigerant and pressure behaviour for high-ambient (T-class) Gulf conditions and 230/400 V 60 Hz operation, and explicitly document refrigerant type and charge weight in the PCoC technical file. Any HFC-based models should be assessed against Saudi Kigali-Amendment phase-down obligations before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R600a是沙特市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，被允许使用。但制造商须核实R600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，针对高环境温度（T类）海湾条件及230/400 V 60 Hz运行验证可燃制冷剂及压力行为，并在PCoC技术文件中明确记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含氢氟烃的型号在进入市场前须依据沙特《基加利修正案》削减义务进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R600a是沙特市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，被允許使用。但製造商須核實R600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA限值，針對高環境溫度（T類）海灣條件及230/400 V 60 Hz運行驗證可燃製冷劑及壓力行為，並在PCoC技術文件中明確記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含氫氟碳化物的型號在進入市場前須依據沙特《基加利修正案》削減義務進行評估。
